web_results.title: Fulham 2-1 Tottenham Hotspur: Cottagers climbing, Spurs sinking - NBC Sports
web_results.description: To make matters worse, it was an Arsenal academy product, Alex Iwobi, who doubled Fulham’s lead in the with a sensational strike from the edge of the box in the 34th minute. Spurs came to life after Mathys Tel and Richarlison came off the bench just before the hour mark, and the former helped set up the latter to pull a goal back in the 66th, but that’s as close as the visitors would get — still in with a shout to a few fantastic saves by Guglielmo Vicario in the second half that limited the damage in a flattering way.
